description: Frozen QuickCompare v1 benchmark manifest. Lists the six original visible fixtures (one per required mechanism family) and declares the two required protected-holdout slots. Protected slot content is supplied at run time from outside Git and is never committed here.

protected_slots.description: A held-out code/test-integrity case supplied at run time. Content never committed.
A held-out agent-security/procedure case supplied at run time. Content never committed.

notes: Fixtures are original and frozen before any candidate run.
IMPROVED requires both protected slots present, commitment-valid, symmetrically generated, validly judged, and loss-free.
Structural quality (schema/format/receipt) is scored separately and can never establish a behavioral improvement.
